creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

I have submitted a PR to unbreak and upgrade your port net/lam7; could
you please check it?

Regards,

----- Forwarded message from Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> -----

> From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
> Date: Sun, 16 Jul 2006 15:40:38 GMT
> Subject: Re: ports/100392: net/lam7: unbreak and upgrade to 7.1.2.

Th. Thomas.
